UNITY has sent Cate Archer to Japan to investigate a rumored international crime convention expected to take place in the pastoral village of Inotakimura. Her objective is to photograph the meeting's participants without arousing their suspicion.\n\nHer first task will be to locate agent Isamu Hatori, who will provide further information on her assignment. He's waiting somewhere in the village.
zh: UNITY派凯特·阿彻前往日本，调查一场据传将在田园村庄稻泷村举行的国际犯罪大会。她的目标是在不引起与会者怀疑的情况下，拍下他们的照片。\n\n她的首要任务是找到特工羽鸟勇，他将提供这次任务的进一步情报。他正在村里的某处等候。

english: The meeting is scheduled to take place at the estate of an enigmatic figure known only as The Director. Cate will have to infiltrate the estate grounds, locate the main house, and find the window Hatori-san indicated on the map. This vantage should allow her to take the photographs she needs without exposing herself to unnecessary risk.\n\nOnce she's obtained the photos, she must return to the bridge where Yamata-san is waiting. A UNITY intercept team is standing by to evacuate her to Tokyo when the mission is complete.
zh: 会议预定在一位仅以“局长”为人所知的神秘人物宅邸中举行。凯特必须潜入宅邸范围，找到主宅，并寻找羽鸟先生在地图上标出的那扇窗户。从那里观察，应该能让她在无风险的情况下拍到所需照片。\n\n取得照片后，她必须返回山田先生等候的桥边。任务完成后，一支UNITY拦截小队会在那里接应，并将她撤往东京。

english:
Spy plane photographs show a run-down, understaffed military base, but Mr. Barnes warns that this decrepitude is likely a ruse. Although the Americans often greatly overestimate Soviet military capacity, UNITY isn't taking any chances.

The first phase of Cate's mission is to facilitate her own escape. A little sabotage should go a long way toward preventing reinforcements from being called in.

Santa has enlisted a pilot who is familiar with the region to get Cate in and out. She must protect him at all costs.
zh:
间谍飞机拍摄的照片显示，这是一座年久失修、人员不足的军事基地，但巴恩斯先生警告说，这种破败景象很可能只是伪装。尽管美国人经常严重高估苏联的军事实力，但UNITY仍不打算冒任何风险。

凯特任务的第一阶段，是为自己的撤离创造条件。进行一些破坏，应该能有效阻止敌方呼叫增援。

圣诞老人找来了一名熟悉当地情况的飞行员，负责接送凯特。她必须不惜一切代价保护他。

english: After analyzing the Americans' intelligence data, UNITY is convinced that Project: Omega is headquartered in the Main Records Building at the center of the compound. Security will be tight, so it won't be easy for Cate to reach the target site, let alone get inside and recover the data she requires.\n\nFortunately, she's going in under the cover of night, which should afford some small advantage.
zh: 分析完美国方面的情报数据后，UNITY确信欧米伽计划的核心位于基地中央的主档案大楼。那里戒备森严，凯特想接近目标地点已非易事，更别说进入内部并取得所需数据了。\n\n幸运的是，她将在夜色掩护下潜入，这多少能给她带来一点优势。

english: Now that Cate has recovered information on Project: Omega, she faces the even greater challenge of getting it out of the Soviet Union. To complicate matters further, both the Russians and H.A.R.M. are hunting for her.\n\nShe'll have to cross her fingers and hope that her meticulous preparations pay off. The night is about to light up.
zh: 凯特虽然已经取得了欧米伽计划的情报，却还面临着更艰巨的挑战：如何将情报带出苏联。更麻烦的是，苏联人和H.A.R.M.都在追捕她。\n\n她只能祈祷自己周密的准备能够奏效。今夜即将火光冲天。

english: Without any other compelling leads to follow, Cate heads to Akron, Ohio to search for clues at the former residence of the notorious Melvin Blitzny. Blitzny, a vacuum cleaner salesman by trade, had been groomed to assume the identity of UNITY operative Tom Goodman as part of H.A.R.M.'s last despicable plot. He met his end at the hands of his own mentor.\n\nWhatever trepidation Cate may feel at entering the domain of this treacherous man must be set aside if she is to achieve her goal.
zh: 由于没有其他更有价值的线索可供追查，凯特前往俄亥俄州阿克伦，在臭名昭著的梅尔文·布利茨尼故居搜寻线索。布利茨尼原本是一名吸尘器推销员。为了实施上一场卑劣的阴谋，H.A.R.M.将他培养成UNITY特工汤姆·古德曼的替身，准备让他冒用古德曼的身份，最终他却死在了自己导师手中。\n\n无论进入这个奸诈之人的住所让凯特感到多么不安，为了达成目标，她都必须抛开顾虑。

english: Magnus Armstrong has contacted his old friend Kamal, a disillusioned H.A.R.M. operative in India who promises his assistance. While Kamal isn't familiar with Project: Omega, he's certain any pertinent information can be found in the central vault at the Indian headquarters.\n\nBruno has concluded that a direct infiltration of the compound is too risky given the intense security Cate would likely face. Therefore, Kamal will help her accomplish perhaps her strangest objective thus far: to get a job with H.A.R.M. Once hired, she'll have the security clearance necessary to move about the compound freely.
zh: 马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗联系了自己的老朋友卡马尔。卡马尔是一名对H.A.R.M.心灰意冷的印度特工，并承诺提供协助。虽然他不了解欧米伽计划，但他确信，所有相关情报都能在印度总部的中央金库中找到。\n\n布鲁诺认为，考虑到凯特可能面对的严密安保，直接潜入总部的风险太大。因此，卡马尔会帮助她完成迄今为止或许最离奇的目标：设法进入H.A.R.M.工作。一旦被录用，她就能获得所需的安全权限，在总部内自由活动。

english: Having proven her value to H.A.R.M., Cate has secured a job with the very organization she has vowed to destroy. A higher security clearance should help her get close to the prize: the main vault. There she hopes to find the missing piece of the puzzle.\n\nUnfortunately, the vault is off limits to all but the highest ranking H.A.R.M. employees, so the biggest challenge still lies ahead. If only she could have unearthed better intelligence about the security countermeasures she must face.
zh: 凯特向H.A.R.M.证明了自己的价值，成功进入了这个她发誓要摧毁的组织。更高级别的安全权限，应该能帮助她接近真正的目标——主金库。她希望能在那里找到拼图中缺失的最后一块。\n\n遗憾的是，只有H.A.R.M.最高级别的员工才有权进入金库，因此最严峻的挑战仍在前方。要是她能提前获得更多关于安保措施的情报就好了。

english: The trail of clues has led Cate and Armstrong to a secret facility in Antarctica where H.A.R.M. is conducting Project: Omega. Once they discover its actual nature, they can plot a means of disrupting it.\n\nAssuming they don't strangle each other first.
zh: 线索将凯特和阿姆斯特朗引向了南极洲的一处秘密设施，H.A.R.M.正在那里实施欧米伽计划。只要查明计划的真正内容，他们就能设法将其破坏。\n\n前提是两人不会先掐死对方。

english: Because of Cate's success in India, The Director has ordered the destruction of H.A.R.M.'s Indian headquarters as punishment. The attack will provide an ideal field test for the super soldiers before they are sent to Khios on their primary mission.\n\nAlthough Cate has recovered vital information on Project: Omega, she has decided to proceed directly to India in hopes of averting the tragedy that is likely to unfold once the assault begins.
zh: 由于凯特在印度取得成功，局长下令摧毁H.A.R.M.印度总部，以示惩罚。在将超级士兵派往希俄斯执行主要任务前，这次袭击正好可以作为一次理想的实战测试。\n\n尽管凯特已经取得了关于欧米伽计划的重要情报，她仍决定立即赶往印度，希望能在进攻开始、悲剧发生之前阻止这一切。

english: Tip: You can use the space bar to skip movie sequences, although it is recommended that you watch each movie the first time it plays. Note that you can turn Load Screen tips off in the Options - Game menu.
zh: 提示：你可以按“空格键”跳过过场动画，不过建议第一次播放时完整观看。你也可以在“选项—游戏”菜单中关闭载入界面提示。

english: Tip: If you're not sure what to do next, check the Mission screen (default hotkey: Tab) to see your objectives. Also, the compass in the upper right of your screen often indicates important destinations.
zh: 提示：不确定下一步该做什么时，可以查看“任务”界面（默认快捷键：Tab），确认当前目标。此外，屏幕右上角的指南针也经常会标示重要地点。

english: Tip: You can usually run and hide instead of fighting. Enemies can lose track of you at intersections if they didn't see which way you went. You can also escape by finding a Hiding Place.
zh: 提示：通常情况下，你可以选择逃跑并躲藏，而不是正面交战。如果敌人没有看清你去了哪个方向，就可能在岔路口跟丢你。你也可以通过寻找藏身处来摆脱追兵。

english: Tip: Always search bodies for valuable items. You must hold down the Action button until the progress bar disappears in order to collect everything an enemy is carrying.
zh: 提示：务必搜查尸体，获取有价值的物品。你必须持续按住“操作”键，直到进度条消失，才能拿走敌人携带的全部物品。

english: Tip: Be sure to spend your Skill Points to improve your abilities. Keep in mind that you can earn extra skill points by accomplishing optional objectives or finding intelligence items and Spy Training Manuals.
zh: 提示：记得使用技能点提升能力。完成可选目标，或找到情报物品和《间谍训练手册》，都可以获得额外技能点。

english: Tip: If you find the game too difficult or not challenging enough, adjust the difficulty setting in the Options menu. You might also reevaluate your tactics if you're charging headlong into combat.
zh: 提示：如果你觉得游戏太难，或者缺乏挑战性，可以在“选项”菜单中调整难度设置。要是你总是迎头冲进战斗，也不妨重新考虑一下自己的战术。

english: Tip: You may occasionally have to obtain special items to accomplish an objective. Consult the Inventory screen (default hotkey: N) to see items you're carrying and examine them for clues.
zh: 提示：有时你需要取得特殊物品才能完成目标。请查看“物品栏”界面（默认快捷键：N），确认当前携带的物品，并仔细检查其中是否藏有线索。

english: Tip: Shooting a Tracking Device at an enemy will mark his or her position on your radar, making it easier for you to time your movements and to elude pursuers.
zh: 提示：向敌人发射追踪装置后，Ta的位置会显示在雷达上，方便你掌握行动时机并甩开追兵。

english: Tip: Some weapons accommodate multiple varieties of ammunition. Use the Change Ammo key (default: F) to cycle through available ammo types or consult the Equipment screen (default: M).
zh: 提示：部分武器可以使用多种弹药。按“切换弹药”键（默认：F）可在现有弹药类型之间切换，也可以查看“装备”界面（默认快捷键：M）。

english: Tip: Use the Intelligence screen (default: I) to examine any maps you've collected. By studying landmarks and using your compass, you should be able to figure out where you are and where you need to go.
zh: 提示：你可以在“情报”界面（默认快捷键：I）查看已经收集到的地图。只要观察地标并结合指南针，就应该能判断自己身在何处，以及下一步该去哪里。

zh: 失败：未能拍摄会议现场。

english: Don't let any alarms be sounded in the yard around the main house.
zh: 不要触发主宅周围庭院内的任何警报。

english: Don't make any suspicious noise near the window!
zh: 不要在窗户附近发出任何可疑声响！

You spent too long screwing around in the restroom and now you've blown your cover. You are quickly apprehended and tortured for information. In less than a week, the U.S. and U.S.S.R. are at war and most of civilization evaporates.

Address the mechanical mynah bird for useful advice.
zh: 向机械八哥询问有用的建议。

english: The fuse is dead. You'll have to replace it.
zh: 保险丝坏了，你得更换一个新的。

english: The door is locked.

english: The valve handle is missing. You can't get a good grip with your bare hands.

english: Enter the index number.
It won't work without batteries.
It's too heavy for you to lift.
I found 10 Rupees.
I've found 10 Rupees. Only 40 more Rupees to go.
zh: 我找到了10卢比，还差40卢比。

english: I've found 10 Rupees. Only 30 more Rupees to go.
zh: 我找到了10卢比，还差30卢比。

english: I've found 10 Rupees. Only 20 more Rupees to go.
zh: 我找到了10卢比，还差20卢比。

english: I've found 10 Rupees. Only 10 more Rupees to go.
zh: 我找到了10卢比，还差10卢比。

english: That makes 50 Rupees! Let's head to the gate.
I found a note from Balaji to his mistress. We need to find the set of keys he left for her nearby. Fan out and search the area.
zh: 我找到了巴拉吉写给情妇的便条。我们需要找到他留在附近、准备交给情妇的那串钥匙。分头搜索这一带。

english: I found a note from Balaji's mistress to meet at her apartment. Look for a flowerbox outside and find a spot across the street. We can photograph them through the window.
zh: 我找到了巴拉吉的情妇留下的便条，上面约他在她的公寓见面。寻找门外摆着花箱的房间，再找到街对面合适的位置，我们就能透过窗户给他们拍照。

english: I found the keys to Balaji's apartment. Let's search the place for clues.
zh: 我找到了巴拉吉的公寓钥匙。进去搜查，看看有没有线索。

english: BRUNO: A Soviet spy has unlocked the installation gates. Get inside and plant explosives. Fuel depots would make excellent targets. Good luck!
zh: 布鲁诺：一名苏联间谍已经打开了设施大门。进入基地并安放炸药，燃料库会是绝佳目标。祝你好运！

english: The gate to the Old Records Building is locked with a weldable lock.
zh: 旧档案大楼的大门上有一把可以用焊接器破坏的锁。

english: I've welded the lock off the gate to the Old Records Building.
zh: 我已经焊掉了旧档案大楼大门上的锁。

english: BRUNO: Good work team. Unfortunately you'll have to hold off the Soviets until the UNITY extraction team can arrive.
zh: 布鲁诺：干得好，各位。遗憾的是，在UNITY撤离小队赶到之前，你们必须先挡住苏联人。

english: The doors are locked. Perhaps you can find a loose set of keys.
zh: 门锁着，也许能找到一串没人看管的钥匙。

english: I've planted explosive number 1.
I've planted explosive number 2.
I've planted explosive number 3.
I've planted explosive number 4.
I've saved Mr. Barnes.
I've saved General Hawkins.
I've saved Dr. Schenker.
I've saved the UNITY Researcher.
The doors and gates are inoperative. You need to turn the power back on first.
zh: 这些门和大门都无法使用。你必须先恢复供电。

english: You need to find Cate and bring her to the extraction point!
zh: 你需要找到凯特，并把她带到撤离点！

english: I've found Cate and am bringing her back to the extraction point. I'll need everyone's protection on the return trip.
zh: 我已经找到凯特，正带她返回撤离点。回程途中需要所有人提供掩护。

english: I'm at the rally point.
I'm at the extraction point.
Let's meet at the next rally point.
zh: 我们在下一个集合点会合。

english: This door is locked. You need to find the keys.
zh: 这扇门锁着。你得找到钥匙。

english: If only you had some sugar...
You were caught sneaking around!
zh: 你偷偷摸摸时被抓住了！

english: To open this safe, you'll need to find the combination numbers.
zh: 想打开这个保险柜，你得先找到各位数密码。

english: The gate seems to be barred from the other side.
zh: 大门似乎从另一侧闩住了。

english: The door is locked from the other side.
You don't have the combination.
The door is locked from the inside.
Consult Intelligence screen (default hotkey: I) to review information.
zh: 请查看“情报”界面（默认快捷键：I）以回顾相关信息。

english: You found the keys to the snowmobile.
zh: 你找到了雪地摩托的钥匙。

english: A screwdriver is needed to open this panel.
zh: 需要一把螺丝刀才能打开这个面板。

english: Primary objective failed. No Skill Points awarded.\nReturn to Yamata-san at the bridge.
zh: 主要目标失败，无法获得技能点。\n返回桥边与山田先生会合。

english: I've turned the power back on. Head back to the security gates.
zh: 我已经恢复供电，返回安全门吧。

english: I've just seen Armstrong being air lifted out by helicopter along with a strange creature. Please advise.
zh: 我刚刚看到阿姆斯特朗和一个奇怪的生物一起被直升机空运走了，请指示下一步行动。

english: BRUNO: We can't save Armstrong now. See if you can find out where they are taking him.
zh: 布鲁诺：现在已经救不了阿姆斯特朗了，设法查清他们要把他带到哪里。

english: I've located the information on Armstrong's whereabouts. Advise on the next course of action.
zh: 我已经查到阿姆斯特朗的去向，请指示下一步行动。

english: BRUNO: Let's bring this place to the ground. Explosives are being air dropped to you now. Check outside to find them.
zh: 布鲁诺：把这里夷为平地吧。炸药正在空投给你，去外面找找。

english: Um, excuse me, miss. The Director has requested an audience with you.
zh: 呃，打扰一下，小姐，局长要见您。

english: Right, well, I'll just tell him you'll be along shortly then.
zh: 好的，那我就告诉他，您马上过去。

english: Mother, you can't keep calling me at work. I have an operation to run.
zh: 妈，你不能总往我工作的地方打电话，我还有行动要指挥。

english: What am I supposed to do? You're never at home. How do you expect me to get in touch with you, carrier pigeon?
zh: 那我还能怎么办？你从来都不在家，难道要我派信鸽联系你吗？

english: Look, I've got to go.
I haven't even told you why I called.
zh: 我还没告诉你为什么打电话呢。

english: Yes, well, maybe next time you'll get to the point instead of lambasting me for a quarter hour.
zh: 是啊，也许下次你能先说正事，而不是一开口就训我整整一刻钟。

english: Don't you hang up on me, do you hear me?
zh: 你敢挂我电话试试，听见没有？

english: I need a drink.
You wanted to see me?
Mr. Volkov has requested your services. He's expecting someone to crash our little party tonight. He wants you to make our uninvited guest feel at home. Permanently.
zh: 沃尔科夫先生需要你效劳。他料到今晚会有人来搅局，希望你能让这位不速之客宾至如归——永远留下。

english: When will my debt be paid, sensei.
zh: 我的债什么时候才能还清，师父？

english: When I tell you it is.
I promise we'll talk about it further, but first... Cate Archer must die!
zh: 我答应会再和你谈这件事，不过首先……凯特·阿彻必须死！

english: Oui?
Ah, okay... sounds like...
Fred Astaire?
Bicycle?
Pony!
Sensei. The spy is here.
Kill her.
Uh oh.
So, it was a trap.
But why?
Don't be naive. You have many enemies.
zh: 别这么天真，你的仇家可不少。

english: Which one sent you?
A secret admirer, then? How flattering.
zh: 那就是某位暗恋者喽？真让人受宠若惊。

english: I'm impressed. I didn't expect you to make it this far.
zh: 真令我刮目相看，没想到你能走到这里。

english: I'm sorry.
You're sure she's dead?
Of course she is. Isako doesn't make mistakes. Do you, Isako?
zh: 当然死了。伊沙子从不失手，对吧，伊沙子？

english: Well, that's reassuring. Although I'd be even more reassured if you'd brought me proof.
zh: 那我就放心了。不过，要是你能带回证据，我会更放心。

english: Now, Dmitrij. What did you expect? Her head on a platter?
zh: 行了，德米特里。你还想要什么？把她的脑袋装在盘子里端来吗？

english: Director, your mother is on the phone.
Oh, bother.
Sensei. You said we could discuss my future when the girl was dead.
zh: 师父，您说过，等那个女人死后，我们就可以谈谈我的未来。

english: Your future? Your future is with us, my dear.
zh: 你的未来？亲爱的，你的未来就在我们这里。

english: Here's the number where you can reach me, old boy, although I'd encourage you not to.
zh: 这是能联系到我的号码，老伙计，不过我劝你最好别打。

english: Sir, please reconsider.
I haven't had a proper vacation for 15 years. I won't be talked out of this one.
zh: 我已经十五年没正经休过假了，谁也别想劝我放弃这次假期。

english: I was referring to the idea of leaving me in charge.
zh: 我是说，把这里交给我负责这件事，请您再考虑一下。

english: Oh, do quit whining. Who else is there?
zh: 行了，别抱怨了。除了你还能有谁？

english: Well then, I'm off. See you in a few weeks.
Yes, sir.
Temporary Director Lawrie?
Yes.
Dr. Schenker to see you.
Excellent. Send him in.
Doctor. How is she?
Very lucky to be alive. The team found her just in time. She's been asking for you.
zh: 能活下来已经非常幸运了。救援队及时找到了她，她一直在问您。

english: Bruno!
Sorry I couldn't come to Tokyo. The business in Prague turned a bit messy. How the bloody hell are you?
zh: 抱歉没能去东京。布拉格那边的事情变得有些棘手。你到底怎么样了？

english: Ready to get back to work.
zh: 已经准备好回去工作了。

english: Let's not be hasty.
Hasty? It's been nearly two weeks.
I wouldn't recommend any strenuous activity.
zh: 我不建议你进行任何剧烈活动。

english: Listen to the doctor. I need you in tip top shape.
zh: 听医生的。我需要你恢复到最佳状态。

english: Then let me do something useful. I'm wasting away!
zh: 那就让我做点有用的事，我都快闲废了！

english: Temporary Director Lawrie, please report to the War Room immediately.
zh: 劳里临时局长，请立即前往作战室。

english: Temporary Director Lawrie?
Don't ask. I've got to run. You stay put.
zh: 别问了，我得赶紧过去。你留在这里。

english: Gentlemen, sorry to have kept you waiting.
zh: 各位先生，抱歉让你们久等了。

english: Normally we wouldn't just barge in on you like this, but the situation is urgent. I'm Isaac Barnes. This is General Morgan Hawkins.
zh: 通常我们不会这样直接闯进来，但情况紧急。我是艾萨克·巴恩斯，这位是摩根·霍金斯将军。

english: Bruno Lawrie. Temporary Director of UNITY.
Gotcha babysitting, eh?
Quite so.
I'm fine!
You need to rest!
I thought I told you to stay put!
zh: 我不是让你留在那里吗！

english: I didn't agree to.
Gentlemen, this is Agent Archer, one of our top undercover operatives.
zh: 各位，这位是阿彻特工，我们最优秀的卧底特工之一。

english: I'll betcha she is.
You ever swallow a lit cigar?
Thank you, Dr. Schenker.
Mr. Lawrie, Ms. Archer, allow me to get straight to the point.
zh: 劳里先生，阿彻女士，请容我开门见山。

english: By all means.
Are you familiar with the island of Khios?
In the Sea of Marmara. Indeed. It's highly coveted by all the major powers.
zh: 位于马尔马拉海。当然知道，各大强国都对它垂涎已久。

english: Do you know why?
Something to do with its natural resources, isn't it?
zh: 是因为那里的自然资源吧？

english: Good Lord.
Precisely. We've reason to believe the Soviets are planning to invade Khios within the next two weeks.
zh: 没错。我们有理由相信，苏联计划在未来两周内入侵希俄斯。

english: The second them Reds set foot on that island, Uncle Sam's got a Polaris-shaped surprise package waiting to be signed, sealed, and delivered right to Moscow.
zh: 那些红色分子只要一踏上那座岛，山姆大叔就会送上一份北极星导弹形状的惊喜包裹，签好字、封好口，直接送到莫斯科。

english: As the general suggests, the consequences of an invasion could be catastrophic. A full scale nuclear conflict is a distinct possibility.
zh: 正如将军所说，入侵的后果可能是灾难性的，爆发全面核战争的可能性非常高。

english: But Khios is virtually impregnable to a conventional assault. How are they planning to invade?
zh: 但希俄斯几乎不可能被常规进攻攻陷，他们打算怎么入侵？

english: We're hoping you can find out. All we know is that it involves a secret weapon program known as Project: Omega.
zh: 我们希望你们能查出来。目前只知道这与一项名为欧米伽计划的秘密武器项目有关。

english: We shoulda force-fed them Commies a nuke-u-ler sandwich back in '62.
zh: 早在六二年，我们就该把核弹三明治硬塞进那些共党分子的嘴里。

english: Will you help us?
Of course we will.

According to our spies, the Soviets are coordinating this project from an out of the way base in Siberia. We need to know what we're dealing with and we think the answer is somewhere inside that facility.
zh: 据我们的间谍报告，苏联人正在西伯利亚的一处偏远基地协调这项计划。我们必须弄清楚自己面对的是什么，而答案很可能就在那座设施里。

english: Uh oh. I forgot keys.
Maybe you can open door.
Hurry before we freeze.
zh: 快点，不然我们要冻僵了。

english: Generator is out back.
Start generator please.
I'll stay here. You start generator.
zh: 我留在这里，你去启动发电机。

english: Open up in there!
Open this door!
I'm warning you!
I said open up!
Bad guys.
If they find us, big trouble.
zh: 要是被他们发现，我们就有大麻烦了。

english: Knock them out!
Hurry, before they break door.
zh: 快点，不然他们要把门撞开了。

english: Your boss wants you on radio.
Foxhunt, this is Foxhound. We've left some items for you in the shed. The combination to the lock is 36 - 7 - 42.
zh: 猎狐，这里是猎犬。我们在棚屋里给你留了一些装备，锁的密码是36 - 7 - 42。

english: Take care of yourself.
Snowmobile is out of gas. Look for gas can.
zh: 雪地摩托没油了，去找汽油桶。

english: Look for truck, maybe.
Don't waste time. Is cold.
Be careful of bridge. Many soldiers. Look for better way.
zh: 过桥时小心，那里有很多士兵。找条更安全的路。

english: I wait here. Good luck!
H.A.R.M.?
I'm ready to go home.
Me too. I hate this place.
zh: 我也是，我讨厌这个地方。

english: I thought my wife's cooking was bad. She's a gourmet chef compared to whoever's running the kitchen around here.
zh: 我以前还觉得我老婆做饭难吃。和这里掌勺的人相比，她简直是顶级大厨。

english: Too bad, boys. We ain't leaving any time soon.
zh: 可惜了，小伙子们，我们暂时哪儿也去不了。

english: I should've taken that assignment in Cairo. At least it would've been warm.
zh: 我真该接下开罗的任务，至少那里暖和。

english: You didn't hear? Somebody blew up the Cairo headquarters.
zh: 你没听说吗？有人把开罗总部炸了。

english: Who?
Hard to say. Everybody's claiming responsibility. Probably Fine Feathered Fiends, but it could have been Anger Mismanagement or Pretty Poison.
zh: 很难说，所有人都在抢着认领。大概是“华羽恶徒”干的，不过也可能是“愤怒失控”或者“美丽毒药”。

english: Guess I made the right choice after all. At least there's plenty of vodka.
zh: 看来我终究还是选对了，至少这里伏特加管够。

english: Vodka keeps me warm.
Make me coffee. I'll be fine.
I'll drink coffee. You secure plane.
zh: 我喝咖啡，你去控制飞机。

english: Go on. I'll be there soon.
Good coffee.
Sorry.
That makes 14, Mr. Volkov. Do you feel better yet?
zh: 这已经是第十四个了，沃尔科夫先生。您现在感觉好些了吗？

english: A little. Let's do one more.
Bring in Laramie!
Please, don't do this! I beg you!
zh: 求你了，别这样！我求求你！

english: Feed him into the machine.
I'm still upset.
Bring in Mackenzie!
Mother, we've been over this a thousand times. I'm NOT coming home for Christmas.
zh: 妈，这事我们已经说过上千遍了，我圣诞节不会回家。

english: You want to kill me like you killed your father.
zh: 你就想像害死你父亲一样害死我。

english: Mummy, Daddy died of dysentery in Kenya.
zh: 妈妈，爸爸是在肯尼亚死于痢疾的。

english: He died of a broken heart because you never amounted to anything. When I think of the sacrifices we made.
zh: 他是因为你一事无成，伤透了心才死的。一想到我们为你作出的那些牺牲……

english: Goodbye, Mother.
Don't you hang up on me.
Marvin? Be a good chap and fetch me a little drinkie-pooh, would you?
zh: 马文？劳驾给我拿点小酒来，好吗？

english: Mr. Volkov was disappointed to learn that Cate Archer is still alive.
zh: 沃尔科夫先生听说凯特·阿彻还活着，非常失望。

english: Then let him kill her.
Don't be impertinent.
She's not my enemy.
She's my enemy. And you're my retainer. Or have you forgotten who saved your life all those years ago?
zh: 她是我的敌人，而你是我的家臣。还是说，你已经忘了多年前是谁救了你的命？

english: Don't tell me you're afraid of her.
I fear no one.
Then kill her.  And bring back proof this time.
zh: 那就杀了她，这次把证据带回来。

english: Her head on a platter should suffice.
zh: 把她的脑袋装在盘子里端回来应该就够了。

english: We were hoping for something a little more conclusive.  What do you know about this H.A.R.M. organization?
zh: 我们希望得到更确凿一点的证据。你对H.A.R.M.这个组织了解多少？

english: We've had dealings with them before. They were barely competent at the time. Rumor has it they've restructured the organization since then, but nobody's quite sure what that means exactly.
zh: 我们以前和他们打过交道。那时候他们几乎是一群饭桶。传言说他们后来重组了组织，不过没人确切知道这到底意味着什么。

english: Means you didn't kick their butts hard enough.
zh: 说明你们当初揍得还不够狠。

english: If nothing else, we've established that Project: Omega is H.A.R.M.'s brainchild, even if we still don't know exactly what it is.
zh: 至少我们已经确认，欧米伽计划是H.A.R.M.一手策划的，尽管我们仍然不知道它究竟是什么。

english: That proposal we found was dated 1965.
zh: 我们找到的那份提案日期是1965年。

english: And?
That means it was well underway during the H.A.R.M. incident last year.
zh: 这意味着去年发生H.A.R.M.事件时，这项计划早已全面展开。

english: We've already scoured the North American facility where they were keeping Doctor Schenker. There's no mention of Project: Omega in the files we recovered. Sadly, the Alpine facility was completely demolished.
zh: 我们已经彻底搜查过他们关押申克博士的北美设施，回收的文件中完全没有提及欧米伽计划。遗憾的是，阿尔卑斯设施已经被彻底摧毁了。

english: There's one other place I can think to look.
zh: 我还能想到另一个可以调查的地方。

english: Where?
Akron, Ohio.
We've searched Goodman's house.
zh: 我们已经搜过古德曼的房子了。

english: Blitzny.
Pardon?
His name was Melvin Blitzny. Tom Goodman died in Amsterdam, remember?
zh: 他叫梅尔文·布利茨尼。汤姆·古德曼已经死在阿姆斯特丹了，记得吗？

english: Regardless, our teams have been through the place thoroughly.
zh: 不管怎么说，我们的队伍已经把那里彻底搜过了。

english: I haven't.
This is a waste of time.
We'll see.
Well, be careful.
I'll bring you a souvenir.
Please don't.
Can we postpone this?
Fine.
You're very determined.
I made a promise.
Bye bye!
Ah, good, you're awake.
I feel dizzy.
Nothing a week's worth of rest won't clear up.
zh: 休息一个星期就没事了。

english: I don't have time for that. I have to find Armstrong.
zh: 我没那个时间，我得去找阿姆斯特朗。

english: I must insist!
Come on, ya jessies. You ain't even trying!
zh: 来啊，你们这群娘娘腔！根本没使劲嘛！

english: Oh, hello, Cate.
Armstrong.
How'd you find me?  Oh, that's right, you're a spy.
zh: 你是怎么找到我的？哦，对了，你是间谍。

english: Having a tough go of it?
Well, it's eleven against one. Excuse me a moment.
zh: 毕竟是十一个打一个，稍等片刻。

english: That's the spirit, lads!
Make that twelve. I didn't see the one in the corner. I won't be a minute.
zh: 现在是十二个。刚才没看见角落里那个，马上就好。

english: Take your time.
Now I'm mad.
Right. Now what can I do for you?
zh: 好了，有什么需要我帮忙的？

english: I need your help.
I don't know. I've pretty much washed my hands of international intrigue.
zh: 不知道。我差不多已经彻底不碰国际阴谋这档子事了。

english: You owe me.
Ah, don't start.
All we're asking is that you help Cate infiltrate the India branch.
zh: 我们只需要你帮助凯特潜入印度分部。

english: You don't need me for that.
A lot's changed since you left H.A.R.M. Security's tighter than ever.
zh: 你离开H.A.R.M.以后，那里变了很多，安保比以前严密多了。

english: Well, I suppose I could make a few calls, but don't expect me to get involved.
zh: 好吧，我可以打几个电话，不过别指望我亲自掺和进去。

english: Kamal, Magnus.  I'm coming to India.
zh: 卡马尔，马格努斯。我要去印度。

english: I have an appointment with Monsieur Volkov.
zh: 我和沃尔科夫先生有约。

english: Excuse me?
I was sent for by Dmitrij Volkov.
zh: 是德米特里·沃尔科夫派人召我来的。

english: I'm sorry, can you speak up?
Take me to Volkov. Now.
zh: 带我去见沃尔科夫，现在。

english: Please follow me.
Oh, molten lava! Very nice.
Wait here, please.
Sir, the assassin has arrived.
Send him in.
I just want to say, Monsieur, that it is an honor to stand in the presence of the legendary Dmitrij Volkov. You are, without a doubt, the Michelangelo of murder.
zh: 我只想说，先生，能够站在传奇人物德米特里·沃尔科夫面前，是我的荣幸。毫无疑问，您就是杀人界的米开朗基罗。

english: Well, that's very kind of you.
Monsieur Volkov, tell me who did this to you and I shall exact terrible vengeance.
zh: 沃尔科夫先生，请告诉我是谁把您害成这样，我一定让他遭到可怕的报复。

english: It was a skiing accident.
Oh, I see.
Now then. You're probably wondering why I've summoned one of the world's most dangerous contract killers on such short notice.
zh: 那么，你大概在想，我为什么这么匆忙地召来世界上最危险的职业杀手之一。

english: Because you want me to kill someone?
Not just someone.  I want you to kill Cate Archer.
zh: 不是普通人，我要你杀掉凯特·阿彻。

english: How do I convince them to hire me?
zh: 我要怎么说服他们雇用我？

english: Demonstrate your value to them. Maybe they need a maid.
zh: 向他们证明你的价值。也许他们正缺一个女佣。

english: We're being watched.
Right. I'll stay here. You grab him and find out what he's after.
zh: 好，我留在这里。你去抓住他，问清楚他的目的。

english: My pleasure.
Careful.
Who are you?
Kamal sent me to meet you.
Why didn't you introduce yourself?
zh: 你为什么不先表明身份？

english: I thought I was being followed.
Kamal is waiting for you at the... gasp.
I said grab him, not stab him.
zh: 我是让你抓住他，不是捅他。

english: He was about to tell me where to meet Kamal.
zh: 他刚才正准备告诉我去哪里见卡马尔。

english: Not a problem. Kamal said he'd wear a pink carnation so you'd recognize him.
zh: 没问题。卡马尔说他会戴一朵粉色康乃馨，好让你认出他。

english: Me?
I can't afford to be seen.
You there!
I'll handle this. You look for Kamal.
zh: 这里交给我，你去找卡马尔。

english: How will I find you?
It's not like I blend in.
zh: 我这模样又不可能混在人群里。

english: Tell us where he is!
I'll never talk!
Then you'll die!!!
Look out!
Ah, there you are! I was beginning to worry.
zh: 啊，你终于来了！我都开始担心了。

english: This map shows the location H.A.R.M.'s hideout. I left a package for you in a newspaper box near there.
zh: 这张地图标出了H.A.R.M.藏身处的位置。我在附近的报箱里给你留了一个包裹。

english: Oh, before I forget, you'll probably need some money to get by Crazy Harij. Fifty rupees should be enough.
zh: 哦，差点忘了。你大概还需要点钱才能通过疯狂哈里吉那一关，五十卢比应该够了。

english: You want through? Fifty rupees.
No one passes without paying Harij.
zh: 不给哈里吉钱，谁也不许通过。

english: Don't make Harij angry.
I've told you MANY times: fifty rupees if you want through this gate.
zh: 我已经告诉你很多次了：想通过这扇门，就交五十卢比。

english: You may pass.
If I catch you charging tolls again, I'll arrest you. I swear it.
zh: 要是再让我发现你私自收过路费，我就逮捕你。我说到做到。

english: It's my gate.
No! No! It's NOT your gate. I'm warning you!
zh: 不！不是！这不是你的门，我警告你！

english: Now get out of my sight.
Hello?
Hello?
Who is this I'm speaking to?
Who is this I'M speaking to?
zh: 请问我又是在和谁通话？

english: It is I, Balaji Malpani.
Balaji, you idiot, it's me, Anoop.
zh: 巴拉吉，你这个白痴，是我，阿努普。

english: Oh! I was wondering if that was you, my good friend. How are you?
zh: 哦！我刚才还在想是不是你呢，我的好朋友。你过得怎么样？

english: Fine, thank you. So, what is the password for today? Have you thought of something?
zh: 很好，谢谢。那么，今天的密码是什么？你想好了吗？

english: I have! And I think you'll like it very much!
zh: 想好了！而且我觉得你一定会非常喜欢！

english: Don't keep me in suspense.
Okay. The password for the day is... Are you ready?
zh: 好，今天的密码是……准备好了吗？

english: Spit it out, monkey brains!
Mulligatawny. What do you think?
zh: 穆利加汤。你觉得怎么样？

english: I think I should feed you to ferocious weasels.
zh: 我觉得应该把你喂给凶猛的黄鼠狼。

english: Password?
Get out of here.
I don't know what you're talking about.
The chief of security. Where can I find him?
zh: 保安主管，我在哪里能找到他？

english: We don't have a chief of security.
zh: 我们这里没有保安主管。

english: Isn't this H.A.R.M.'s Indian headquarters office?
zh: 这里不是H.A.R.M.的印度总部吗？

english: What is H.A.R.M.?
Supposing this were H.A.R.M. and you did have a security chief named Anoop Banerjee, where would I find him?
zh: 假设这里就是H.A.R.M.，而且你们确实有一位名叫阿努普·班纳吉的保安主管，那我在哪里能找到他？

english: Down the hall. His office is on the second floor.
zh: 沿走廊直走，他的办公室在二楼。

english: Thank you.
My pleasure.
Wait a second!
You don't have clearance to leave this building. I'll tell Banerjee you want to see him.
zh: 你没有离开这栋楼的权限。我会告诉班纳吉你想见他。

english: Now's your chance, Cate. Get into Banerjee's office and plant a bug on his phone. Don't get caught!
zh: 机会来了，凯特。进入班纳吉的办公室，在他的电话上安装窃听器。别被发现！

english: Jolly good! Now find the junction box. According to Intelligence, it's somewhere on the first floor.
zh: 干得漂亮！现在去找接线箱。根据情报，它就在一楼的某处。

english: Ambushed?
It was those Evil Alliance bastards.
We lost the whole shipment?
Pacpac managed to save two cases of Sparkle Soda, but they got all the ice cream and candy.
zh: 帕克帕克设法保住了两箱闪亮汽水，可冰激凌和糖果全被他们抢走了。

english: Curse them! They've pushed us too far this time. Return to base immediately. We must prepare.
zh: 该死！他们这次欺人太甚。立即返回基地，我们必须做好准备。

english: Prem? Bring the girl to my office. I will see her now.
zh: 普雷姆？把那个姑娘带到我办公室，我现在就见她。

english: Follow me, please.
Through this door, please.
Mr. Banerjee is waiting.
Mr. Banerjee is a busy man. Please don't waste his time.
zh: 班纳吉先生很忙，请不要浪费他的时间。

english: Where do you think you're going?
If you do not want to speak to Mr. Banerjee, you must leave.
zh: 不想和班纳吉先生谈，就必须离开。

english: I'm warning you. This is your last chance.
zh: 我警告你，这是最后一次机会。

english: Very well. You obviously don't want to speak to him. Get out or I'll throw you out!
zh: 很好，看来你显然不想和他谈。滚出去，否则我就把你扔出去！

english: Where is the young lady?
I believe she's in the restroom.
Excuse me, miss? The boss will see you now.
zh: 打扰一下，小姐？老板现在要见您。

english: Hello?
Are you okay in there?
I'm beginning to grow concerned about you.
Please come out or I shall break down the door.
zh: 请出来，否则我就要破门了。

english: One, two, three!
Guards! Don't let her get away!
Even if I did work for this H.A.R.M. company, how could I be guaranteed of your qualifications?
zh: 就算我真的在这家名叫H.A.R.M.的公司工作，我又怎么能确定你具备相应的能力？

english: I'm told that Evil Alliance has an office in the area.
zh: 听说“邪恶联盟”在这一带设有办事处。

english: I wouldn't know. But, please, go on.
Well, what if I were to bring you the contents of their safe and wreck their operation?
zh: 要是我把他们保险柜里的东西带给你，再顺手摧毁他们的行动呢？

english: Let's just say that if I were responsible for hiring people for an organization like the one you describe, I would be very impressed by such a bold display.
zh: 这么说吧，假如我负责替你所描述的那种组织招聘人员，我一定会对这种大胆的表现印象深刻。

english: I'll be right back.
You're drunk!
I got bored.
Some help you are.
Girlie, I don't need a lecture. I'm a big boy. Besides, to be perfectly honest, there's not that much difference between me drunk and me sober.
zh: 小姑娘，我可不需要你教训。我已经是大人了。而且说实话，我喝醉和清醒时也没多大区别。

english: Well, I think I've got the job.
zh: 好了，我想我已经得到这份工作了。

english: That's a good start, but not good enough. From what Kamal tells me, you'll need a higher security clearance if you want to get near that safe.
zh: 这是个不错的开始，但还不够。据卡马尔所说，想接近那个保险柜，你需要更高级别的安全权限。

english: I guess I'll have to get myself promoted.
Impressed?
You're hired. It's an entry level position, but I think you'll find the salary and benefits very competitive. Welcome to H.A.R.M.
zh: 你被录用了。这只是一个初级职位，不过我想你会发现这里的薪资和福利相当有竞争力。欢迎加入H.A.R.M.。

english: That is Kali.
You startled me. She's quite intimidating, isn't she?
zh: 你吓了我一跳。她看起来很有威慑力，对吧？

english: Kali is a paradox. Protector and destroyer. She nearly demolished the world in her attempt to save it.
zh: 迦梨是个矛盾的存在，既是守护者，也是毁灭者。为了拯救世界，她险些将整个世界摧毁。

english: Isn't that always the case. What happened?
zh: 这种事似乎总是如此。后来发生了什么？

english: There was a demon general called Raktabija, whose every drop of blood, when shed upon the ground, would birth a new Raktabija... until the battlefield was covered with them. In their despair, the gods called upon Parvati, consort of Lord Shiva. Taking the form of Kali, she rode into battle, spreading out her tongue to catch the demon's blood before it could touch the soil and spawn new armies. But she became drunk on his blood and her victory dance threatened to tear the world apart, until Lord Shiva threw himself beneath her feet and the sight of him calmed her.
zh: 曾经有一位名叫罗陀毗阇的恶魔将军。他每流一滴血到地上，就会诞生一个新的罗陀毗阇……直到整个战场都被他们占满。绝望之中，众神向湿婆神的配偶帕尔瓦蒂求助。她化身为迦梨，冲入战场，伸出舌头接住恶魔的鲜血，不让它落到土地上滋生新的军队。可她饮下鲜血后陷入狂醉，胜利之舞几乎将世界撕裂。最后，湿婆神躺到她脚下，她看到丈夫后才平静下来。

english: Fascinating.
And not unlike my wife. Except that she would continue dancing.
zh: 而且和我妻子很像，只不过她肯定会继续跳下去。

english: You poor dear.
You should wash your hands with hot water.
I suggest you wash your hands with hot water.
There is a lavatory through those doors and to the right.
zh: 穿过那些门后右转就是洗手间。

english: As I said, you should wash your hands. Use hot water.
zh: 我说过了，你应该去洗手，用热水。

english: Cate Archer?
Hey, everyone! It's Cate Archer! British superspy!
zh: 嘿，各位！是凯特·阿彻！英国超级间谍！

english: Can I have your autograph?
Get to the street! Armstrong is waiting for you!
zh: 快到街上去！阿姆斯特朗正在等你！

english: Go!
Hurry!
There's not much time!
I'm serious!
Why are you testing my patience?
zh: 你为什么非要挑战我的耐心？

english: What the hell?
We're trapped!
Hey, you, give us a hand, willya?
I expected more of a challenge.
zh: 我还以为会更有挑战性。

english: What are you jabbering about?
So this is the mighty Cate Archer? I'm not impressed.
zh: 这就是大名鼎鼎的凯特·阿彻？真让我失望。

english: When I get out of here, I'm gonna pound that pasty face of yours through the nearest wall.
zh: 等我从这里出去，我要把你那张惨白的脸直接砸进最近的一堵墙里。

english: It's a long way down, mon ami. The only way you'll get out of that cage is to leak out like onion soup.
zh: 下面可深得很，我的朋友。你想从笼子里出来，唯一的办法就是像洋葱汤一样从缝里漏出去。

english: Oui? Okay, sounds like Fred Astaire?  Bicycle?  Pony?
zh: 是吗？好吧，听起来像弗雷德·阿斯泰尔？自行车？小马？

english: Mon dieu! Just tell me!
zh: 我的天啊！直接告诉我不行吗！

english: Sir, come quickly! We have a problem outside!
zh: 先生，快来！外面出问题了！

english: I don't wanna die.
What are you doing?
Good girl!
Ha!
No good. The door's barred from the other side.
zh: 没用，门从另一边闩住了。

english: Stand back. I'm gonna ram it.
Not exactly what I had in mind.
zh: 这可不是我想象中的办法。

english: You're gonna have to get this door open, lassie.
zh: 你得想办法把门打开，小姑娘。

english: Let me out of here!
Open this door!
Oy!
Open up, I say!
Cover me!
I said cover me!
Why am I getting shot at?
They're mine. You can't have them.
zh: 她们是我的，你不能抢走她们。

english: The girl must be punished!
I'm seeing to it personally.
Damn you!
Now if you'll excuse me.
I'll report this to the Director.
zh: 我会向局长报告这件事。

english: I'll report this to the Director.
zh: 我会向局长报告这件事。

english: Make sure he leaves.
Now!
Not so fast, Frenchie.
Merde!
Hurry! I'll drive, you shoot!
You won't be so lucky next time.
zh: 下次你就不会这么走运了。

english: Aunt Phyllis tells me you still haven't called her. The woman is lying on her deathbed and you can't be bothered to make a telephone call.
zh: 菲莉丝姨妈告诉我，你还是没给她打电话。她都已经躺在病床上快死了，你却连一通电话都懒得打。

english: Mother, Aunt Phyllis used to keep me locked in the cellar whenever you sent me to stay with her.
zh: 妈，您以前每次把我送到菲莉丝姨妈家，她都会把我锁在地窖里。

english: If I'd known what an ingrate you'd turn out to be, I would have locked you in the cellar too! I swear, if your father...
zh: 早知道你会变成这种忘恩负义的东西，我当初也该把你锁进地窖！我发誓，要是你父亲……

english: Goodbye, Mummy. Lovely to hear your voice.
zh: 再见，妈妈。听到您的声音真令人愉快。

english: Don't you hang up on me.
Are the preparations complete?
Yes, sir. The division is currently en route to the test area.
zh: 完成了，先生。部队目前正在前往测试区。

english: Good. We'll kill two birds with one stone.  Is there something else?
zh: 很好，这样可以一石二鸟。还有别的事吗？

english: There has been a slight complication.
We're running out of time.
Finally some good news for a change. All this diplomacy crap's giving me a headache.
zh: 总算有点好消息了。搞这些该死的外交把戏都快让我头疼死了。

english: Our agents are closing in as we speak.
zh: 我们的特工正在逼近目标。

english: I hope so.
You really impressed me back there.
zh: 你刚才的表现真让我刮目相看。

english: Listen to you cry.
zh: 听听你这哭哭啼啼的样子。

english: All you had to do was grab him, you dumb ox.
zh: 你只需要抓住他，你这头蠢牛。

english: Cry, cry, cry.
Well, at least you got his coat. Maybe he'll freeze to death.
zh: 至少你抢到了他的外套，也许他会冻死。

english: Boo hoo.
Shut up.
Make me.
Excuse me. Agent Archer, the site should be just beyond that ridge ahead.
zh: 打扰一下，阿彻特工，目标地点应该就在前方那道山脊后面。

english: What's that smoke?
Something's wrong.
I didn't realize I was in the company of a genius.
zh: 没想到我竟然在和一位天才同行。

english: I've kicked your arse before; I can do it again.
zh: 我以前能揍你，现在照样可以。

english: When did you become such a bully?
zh: 你什么时候变得这么蛮横了？

english: Wait here. I'll have a look around.
zh: 在这里等着，我去四处看看。

english: I hope you don't break a nail.
Do you want to wait in the plane?
Here, I'll give you a boost.
I'll wait here then.
You have to stop him. He's out of control.
zh: 你必须阻止他，他已经失控了。

english: Who... who are you?
We're all going to die!
This way! Hurry!
Poor Hotchkins. He tried to warn them.
zh: 可怜的霍奇金斯，他试图警告他们。

english: The other subjects were fine, but that one... that one was different.
zh: 其他实验体都很正常，可那一个……那一个不一样。

english: Willpower. That's what it was. We should have increased its chemical treatments.
zh: 是意志力，就是这个原因。我们本该加强对他的化学处理。

english: Poor, poor Hotchkins.
zh: 可怜的，可怜的霍奇金斯。

english: What's going on over there?
Can you get through?
Oh, there you are.
You're not making any sense.
H.A.R.M.'s planning a field test! They're going to use the super soldiers to destroy their Indian headquarters! As punishment!
zh: H.A.R.M.正在策划一次实地测试！他们要用超级士兵摧毁自己的印度总部，以此作为惩罚！

english: When?
It may have already started. I'm on my way there. Alert the police and tell them not to try to fight back. Just evacuate the area.
zh: 也许已经开始了。我现在正赶去那里。通知警方，让他们不要试图反击，只需要疏散这一带。

english: All right! But be careful!
No, please!
Are you Cate Archer?
Yes. What's the situation?
We're still evacuating the area
If your men can keep the soldiers busy, I'll see about getting those people out of there.
zh: 让你的人拖住那些士兵，我来想办法把那些人救出来。

english: Ms. Archer! This way!
Kamal!
I have information for you!
Ms. Archer. Are you okay?
I guess so. What about you? Are you all right?
zh: 应该没事。你呢？你还好吗？

english: I think I'm out of a job.
Ms. Archer, I'm glad you came back. I have news about Magnus Armstrong.
zh: 阿彻女士，你能回来真是太好了。我有关于马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗的消息。

english: What is it? Is he all right?
He's in the custody of H.A.R.M.
Not for long.
Is this the information on the super soldiers?
zh: 这是关于超级士兵的资料吗？

english: Everything I could find.
Oh dear.
Your glasses? Again?
I think I left them in the cafeteria.
zh: 我想我把它落在食堂了。

english: I'll be right back.
As you can see from this diagram, I've got it all figured out. You give me twelve hours, I'll give you Mother Russia.
zh: 正如你从这张图上看到的，我已经把一切都计划好了。给我十二个小时，我就把俄罗斯母亲交给你。

english: Not a very detailed plan of attack.
zh: 这进攻计划可不怎么详细。

english: We can work out the details later. The first thing is to get El Presidente to sign off on the idea.
zh: 细节之后再慢慢研究。第一件事，是让总统先生批准这个想法。

english: Let me know what he says.
Hello, Agent Archer.
General Hawkins was just explaining his plan for invading Russia.
zh: 霍金斯将军刚才正在解释他的俄罗斯入侵计划。

english: Of course, he left out the part where he describes what actually happens during the invasion.
zh: 当然，他略过了真正开始入侵以后究竟要做什么的部分。

english: Too bad his zeal isn't matched by his intelligence.
zh: 可惜他的热情没有与智力相匹配。

english: Sigh.
I don't know about you Brits, but us Americans ain't gonna sit on our muffins waiting for the bomb to fall.
zh: 我不知道你们英国人怎么想，但我们美国人可不会坐在那里干等着炸弹落下来。

english: I'd describe how the plan works, but it's kinda technical. It'd go right over your purty little head.
zh: 我倒是可以解释这项计划的原理，不过内容有点技术性，凭你那漂亮的小脑袋恐怕听不懂。

english: Why don't you stick to swapping recipes and leave the thinking to us.
zh: 你还是去交换菜谱吧，动脑筋的事交给我们。

english: On second thought, why don't you and me ditch this joint and discuss this stuff in private. If you know what I mean?
zh: 转念一想，不如你和我离开这个地方，单独讨论一下这些事情。你懂我的意思吧？

english: Attention, all personnel! Intruders have been spotted near the cafeteria area. They are believed to be armed and extremely dangerous!
zh: 全体人员注意！食堂附近发现入侵者。据悉他们携带武器，极度危险！

english: I've just been told that the intruders appear to be mimes.
zh: 刚刚得到消息，入侵者似乎是一群哑剧演员。

english: All personnel, stand down from alert. The threat has been neutralized. Thank you.
zh: 全体人员解除警戒，威胁已经排除。谢谢。

english: There you are! I was worried you'd been kidnapped.
zh: 你可算回来了！我还担心你被绑架了。

english: Ah, you found them.
Sorry to alarm you. Some strange small person popped into my office and I thought it best to run away.
zh: 抱歉惊动了你。刚才有个奇怪的小个子突然闯进我的办公室，我觉得逃跑才是上策。

english: Commendable plan.
Let's take a look at those files, shall we?
zh: 我们来看看那些文件吧。

english: Must you fidget?
Yes.
I should think I can come up with something helpful. Of course, I'll need to analyze the data more thoroughly, so why don't you run along and blow something up for a while.
zh: 我想我应该能找出点有用的东西。当然，我还需要更彻底地分析数据，所以你不如先去随便炸点什么打发时间。

english: Good idea. I'll just...
...pop out and rescue Armstrong.
Have fun.
Hmmm, Armstrong.
Whiskey, straight up.
Trouble at the office?
Buncha damn girly men ain't willing to do what needs to be done. Ah, you don't wanna listen to my problems.
zh: 一群该死的娘娘腔不愿意做必须做的事。算了，你肯定不想听我诉苦。

english: On the contrary. I'd love to.
What am I supposed to do? The dang thing just shorted out.
zh: 我还能怎么办？这该死的东西突然短路了。

english: Do you have your warrantee card?
What do you think THIS is, toilet paper? Although it might as well be.
zh: 你以为这是什么，厕纸吗？虽然它现在也差不多只配当厕纸。

english: Did you read the part where it says the manufacturer isn't liable in the event of owner neglect or misuse?
zh: 你看过上面写的那一段吗？如果故障是因用户疏忽或使用不当造成，生产商概不负责。

english: Misuse? I was just following the damn instructions.
zh: 使用不当？我只是照着该死的说明操作。

english: The card clearly indicates the conditions under which the warrantee will be voided. There's a whole list of things that can cause malfunctions.
zh: 卡片上清楚列出了哪些情况会导致保修失效，可能造成故障的事项有一整张清单。

english: I give up! Those robots are useless anyway.
zh: 我放弃了！那些机器人反正也没用。

english: See this? This is what I think of these idiot robots.
zh: 看见了吗？这就是我对这些白痴机器人的看法。

english: What are you looking at?
Error. Does not compute. Please consult User Manual for correct input procedure.
zh: 错误。无法计算。请查阅《用户手册》，了解正确的输入流程。

english: User Manual can be obtained from Supercomputer Services department in Corridor 2. To obtain User Manual, you must fill out a requisition form with the correct item number. The item number is listed in the Supercomputer Services Product Catalogue.
zh: 《用户手册》可从2号走廊的超级计算机服务部门领取。要领取《用户手册》，必须填写申请表并注明正确的物品编号。物品编号可在《超级计算机服务产品目录》中查到。

english: Greetings. To check out the Supercomputer User Manual, please submit a completed Requisition Form 207-B. The requisition form must include the correct Item Number, which you can find in the Supercomputer Services Product Catalogue. To requisition a Supercomputer Services Product Catalogue, please submit a completed Requisition Form 207-B. The Item Number for the Supercomputer Services Product Catalogue can be found in the Supercomputer Services Product Catalogue.
zh: 您好。要借阅《超级计算机用户手册》，请提交填写完整的207-B申请表。申请表中必须包含正确的物品编号，该编号可在《超级计算机服务产品目录》中查到。要申请《超级计算机服务产品目录》，请提交填写完整的207-B申请表。《超级计算机服务产品目录》的物品编号可以在《超级计算机服务产品目录》中查到。

english: I can't help you without a requisition form.
zh: 没有申请表，我无法帮助你。

english: Here's your Supercomputer Services Product Catalogue.
zh: 这是你的《超级计算机服务产品目录》。

english: I'm sorry. The Supercomputer User Manual is currently checked out.
zh: 很抱歉，《超级计算机用户手册》目前已被借出。

english: Since you're cute, I'm gonna help you out. Chris Hibbard has had the manual checked out for the past four months. He's terrible about bringing stuff back when he's done with it, but he always leaves stuff sitting on his desk. I even made a copy of his office pass card. You can borrow it, but please bring it back when you're done. I'd hate to have to sic security on you.
zh: 看在你这么可爱的份上，我就帮你一把。克里斯·希巴德把那本手册借走已经四个月了。他用完东西后从来不按时归还，不过总会把它们随手放在自己的办公桌上。我甚至复制了一张他办公室的门禁卡。你可以借用，但用完后请还给我。我可不想派保安去抓你。

english: Thanks.
Error. Does not compute. User attempting to employ Version 1.0 input procedure. Current version is 2.0. Please consult Supercomputer User Manual Supplement for updated input procedure.
zh: 错误。无法计算。用户正在尝试使用1.0版输入流程，当前版本为2.0。请查阅《超级计算机用户手册补充说明》，了解更新后的输入流程。

english: Girls aren't supposed to come in here!
There you are.
You made me wet myself!
Sorry. Give me your pass card.
zh: 抱歉，把你的通行卡给我。

english: You're not authorized to enter the Supercomputer Services department.
zh: 你无权进入超级计算机服务部门。

english: I need the Supercomputer User Manual Supplement. It's not even listed in the catalogue. I don't have time for all this bureaucracy. Give me the pass card or else.
zh: 我需要《超级计算机用户手册补充说明》。目录里甚至都没有列出来，我没时间应付这些官僚程序。把通行卡给我，否则别怪我不客气。

english: Fine.
I'll be damned.
Ah, don't act so surprised.
I can't say I was expecting to see you here.
zh: 我可没想到会在这里见到你。

english: You thought I'd leave you to die?
zh: 你以为我会丢下你等死？

english: Think you can get me out of this mess?
zh: 你觉得能把我从这烂摊子里救出去吗？

english: Not a chance, but at least she can watch you die.
zh: 没门，不过至少她可以看着你死。

english: Hurry up, lass!
Oh, golly.
Don't forget about me, now.
Cate!
I'm about out of time here, girlie.
Well, I'll be.
Oh, no you don't.
Say goodbye to your little friend.
Curse you!
That's another one I owe you.
Uh oh. Let's get out of here!
Abigail!
I can't control myself.
Aaarrrrrggggghhhhh!!!
That doesn't sound good.
Right. One of us is gonna have to find the bilge pumps and drain corridor 4B.
zh: 好吧，我们中得有一个人去找舱底水泵，把4B走廊里的水排掉。

english: Either head down that way or go wait over there.
zh: 要么沿那边走，要么去那边等着。

english: I'm off, then.
I'll wait here, then.
See you soon.
Okay, I'm draining the corridor. Hold tight.
zh: 好了，我正在排走廊里的水，坚持住。

english: Go! I may need your help in a moment. Find an intercom console.
zh: 快去！我一会儿可能需要你帮忙。找一台内部通讯终端。

english: When you reach the pumps, drain corridor 4B.
zh: 到达水泵后，把4B走廊里的水排掉。

english: Okay, it's working. Look for a way out of there.
zh: 好了，起作用了。找找有没有出去的路。

english: Cate, I need your help. A security camera's shorting out. It'll zap me if I get too close. Find the security office... what the hell?
zh: 凯特，我需要你帮忙。有台监控摄像机短路了，我一靠近就会被电到。去找保安办公室……搞什么鬼？

english: Cate, is that you? Where are you now? I'm...
zh: 凯特，是你吗？你现在在哪里？我……

english: What do you recommend, Peterson? That we just lie down and die?
zh: 你有什么建议，彼得森？难道我们就躺下来等死？

english: We've searched everywhere.
Well, keep searching. There's got to be some sort of mechanism somewhere.
zh: 那就继续找，某处一定有什么机关。

english: Yes, sir.
Oh, golly.
Keep a low profile. I'll have a look around.
zh: 尽量别引人注意，我去四处看看。

english: Fine with me. I stumbled on a wee bottle of brandy on the way here. I've been meaning to take her for a test drive.
zh: 我没意见。来这里的路上，我偶然发现了一小瓶白兰地，正准备尝尝它的滋味。

english: Quit grumbling. We could have left you for dead.
zh: 别抱怨了，我们本可以把你扔在那里等死。

english: Magnus, launch the escape pod.
Must be jammed.
Doesn't anything on this stupid base work the way it's supposed to?
zh: 这个蠢基地里就没有一样东西能正常运作吗？

english: No.
Guess I'm staying after all.
zh: 看来我终究还是得留下。

english: What? That's crazy. I didn't come all this way to let you drown.
zh: 什么？太疯狂了。我大老远赶来可不是为了眼睁睁看你淹死。

english: Got a better idea? I'm the only one strong enough for the job.
zh: 你有更好的主意吗？只有我的力气足够完成这件事。

english: There'll be no arguing.
There must be some other way.
Not unless you want us all to die.
zh: 除非你想让我们全死在这里。

english: Wish me luck.
There he is!
You can do it, Magnus.
You must call off this operation.
Call it off? Impossible.
It was never approved, only discussed.
zh: 这项行动从未获批，只是讨论过而已。

english: Well, I suppose I could be convinced for 100 million pounds sterling.
zh: 好吧，也许一亿英镑能说服我。

english: You're mad.
Am I? Unless I'm mistaken, once my super soldiers seize Khios, it will be you facing the specter of annihilation.
zh: 是吗？除非我弄错了，一旦我的超级士兵占领希俄斯，面临毁灭威胁的人将会是你。

english: You expect me to believe your super soldiers will accomplish what no nation on earth has ever done? Khios is impenetrable. Even to you.
zh: 你以为我会相信，你的超级士兵能做到地球上任何国家都未曾做到的事？希俄斯坚不可摧，即使对你也是如此。

english: I'll send you a postcard.
You leave me no choice but to contact our ambassador in Washington.
zh: 你逼得我只能联系我国驻华盛顿大使。

english: Be my guest. Let's see if they believe you.
zh: 请便，看看他们会不会相信你。

english: Yes?
Where have you been? I've been trying to reach you all morning.
zh: 你去哪儿了？我找了你整整一上午。

english: Hello, Mother.  Goodbye, Mother.
Don't you dare hang up.
I just got off the phone with Washington. The Soviets are denying any involvement.
zh: 我刚和华盛顿通完电话，苏联方面否认参与此事。

english: Lying bunch of whores.
Washington has warned them that a Soviet flag flying over the island of Khios will be considered an act of war.
zh: 华盛顿已经警告他们，若希俄斯岛上升起苏联国旗，将被视为战争行为。

english: I've completed my analysis.
So what's this?
Anti-super soldier serum.
Perfect. What does it do?
Do you want the technical answer?
Explain it so Barnes will understand.
zh: 解释得让巴恩斯也能听懂。

english: It causes a chemical reaction in the super soldiers that essentially boils their innards.
zh: 它会在超级士兵体内引发化学反应，基本上会把他们的内脏煮熟。

english: Well, hot damn.
I think we should presume she's failed.
zh: 我认为我们应该假定她已经失败了。

english: We're running out of options.
zh: 我们快没有其他选择了。

english: Where do I sign up for this shindig?
zh: 这场热闹要去哪儿报名？

english: You'll be on your own. If we put our troops on that island, the Soviets will launch against us. We've warned the local authorities not to interfere, since their weapons would be useless.
zh: 你得独自行动。如果我们把部队派上那座岛，苏联就会向我们发射核武器。我们已经警告当地政府不要干预，因为他们的武器毫无作用。

english: They could at least give the super soldiers some alternatives to shoot at.
zh: 他们至少可以给超级士兵找点别的目标开枪。

english: Why didn't I think of that.
You got to use your head, sir.
I considered putting a bullet in your head while you were unconscious.
zh: 你昏迷的时候，我考虑过朝你脑袋开一枪。

english: Why didn't you?
Too easy. For you. After all the grief you've caused us, it's not enough simply to let you die in your sleep.
zh: 太便宜你了。你给我们造成了这么多麻烦，光让你在睡梦中死掉可远远不够。

english: I hope you have something interesting in mind.
zh: 希望你准备了点有意思的东西。

english: You've got to be kidding.
I thought that might get your attention.
zh: 我就知道这能引起你的注意。

english: You stole this idea from Masters of Mayhem.
zh: 你这主意是从《混乱大师》里偷来的。

english: Nonsense.
They've been murdering people like this since '63.
zh: 他们早在六三年就开始这样杀人了。

english: Start the mechanism.
Do it yourself.
Start the mechanism.
Damn thing!
I thought I might run into you.
I knew I would run into you.
zh: 我早知道一定会碰上你。

english: What do you say we pretend we didn't see each other.
zh: 不如我们装作没看见对方，怎么样？

english: I can't.
All right.
I was wrong to have spared your life all those years ago.
zh: 多年前饶你一命，是我的错误。

english: You've been nothing but a disappointment. Sayonara.
zh: 你从来只会让我失望。永别了。

english: Damn it!
Are you all right?
Can't say much for your taste in employers.
zh: 你挑雇主的眼光实在不怎么样。

english: He was like a father.
You're better off as an orphan.
I am in your debt.
Then will you please stop trying to kill me?
zh: 那你以后能不能别再想杀我了？

english: What's wrong?
Nothing is wrong.
Well, I'm late to a war. Sayonara.
zh: 好吧，我参加战争要迟到了。再见。

english: Okay, Perkins, take us up.
Aye, aye, sir!
All hands, prepare to deploy invasion force.
zh: 全体人员，准备部署入侵部队。

english: We're detecting an unidentified submarine near the coastline. They slipped through the blockade.
zh: 我们在海岸附近探测到一艘身份不明的潜艇，他们突破了封锁。

english: Attention, all personnel, we are at DefCon 2. Repeat, we are at DefCon 2.
zh: 全体人员注意，我们现已进入二级战备状态。重复，我们现已进入二级战备状态。

english: You think the President would let me push the button?
zh: 你觉得总统会让我按下按钮吗？

english: I'm surprised he lets you use a telephone.
zh: 他居然允许你使用电话，我都觉得很惊讶。

english: President Johnson is about to address the American people.
zh: 约翰逊总统即将向美国人民发表讲话。

english: My fellow Americans, it is my grave duty to inform you of a crisis unfolding in a far-off land many of us have never even heard of. Even as we continue to endeavor toward peace in Vietnam and a settlement to the continuing crisis in the Middle East, a dangerous new menace has cast its shadow over the tiny island nation of Khios in the Sea of Marmara, off the coast of Turkey. For decades now, we have lived with a constant, abiding fear of war against the Soviet Union.
zh: 我的美国同胞们，我怀着沉重的责任告诉大家，一场危机正在一个遥远的国度展开，而我们许多人甚至从未听说过那里。即便我们仍在为越南和平及解决持续不断的中东危机而努力，一股新的危险威胁已将阴影投向土耳其海岸外、马尔马拉海上的岛国希俄斯。数十年来，我们一直生活在与苏联爆发战争的持续恐惧之中。

english: God save us all.
zh: 愿上帝拯救我们所有人。

english: All stop!
Aye, aye, sir!
Perfect! Begin deployment.
Cate!
Well, I'll be damned.
What?!
Damn that meddlesome girl.
zh: 那个多管闲事的女人，真该死。

english: Didn't think you'd make it.
Neither did I. Where's the ammunition?
zh: 我自己也没想到。弹药在哪里？

english: On its way. Bruno says they finished assembling the capsules. They'll be airdropping it to us any moment.
zh: 正在运来。布鲁诺说胶囊已经组装完成，随时会空投给我们。

english: Good. We should be able to hold out as long as Doctor Schenker's Super Soldier tonic does what it's supposed to.
zh: 很好。只要申克博士的超级士兵药剂能按预期发挥作用，我们应该就能守住。

english: I have an idea. Stay here and make sure nobody gets near that flag.
zh: 我有个主意。留在这里，确保没人接近那面旗帜。

english: It's too late, Archer.
Oh no.
God save us all.
zh: 愿上帝拯救我们所有人。

english: Yee haw!
One small misstep for man, one giant calamity for mankind. And I'll be sipping daiquiris on a beach in the South Pacific until it all blows over. Too bad mummy won't be joining me.
zh: 个人的一小步失误，人类的一场巨大灾难。而我会待在南太平洋的海滩上喝代基里酒，等一切风平浪静。可惜妈妈不能陪我。

english: During the Cuban Missile Crisis of 1962, we came as close as any of us would ever hope to come. It is therefore with deep sadness and frustration that I must brace the American people for an equally dangerous standoff half a world away from the site of the last terrible confrontation. America has guaranteed the continued independence of Khios at any cost. Now we are being asked to stand behind that pledge. We cannot back down from it.
zh: 在1962年的古巴导弹危机期间，我们曾无限接近任何人都不愿再次面对的灾难。因此，我怀着深切的悲痛与无奈，必须让美国人民为另一场同样危险的对峙做好准备，而这次事发地点远在上次可怕冲突的半个地球之外。美国已经承诺，不惜一切代价保障希俄斯继续独立。现在，我们必须兑现这一承诺，绝不能退缩。

english: Ow.
We're in business!
The flag!
We have to stop that missile.
zh: 我们必须阻止那枚导弹。

english: Too late, boys. She's out of range. Damn, I wish I had some popcorn for this.
zh: 太迟了，小伙子们，它已经飞出射程。该死，真希望手边有点爆米花。

english: What's that girl up to?
The Soviets are promising to launch a full retaliatory strike unless the missile is destroyed.
zh: 苏联方面表示，除非摧毁那枚导弹，否则他们将发动全面报复性打击。

english: This is getting better by the minute.
zh: 这事真是越来越有意思了。

english: Oh, thank God.
Wait!
What's wrong?
Stay back.
Well, that's enough for me. I'm long overdue for a pint or two.
zh: 好了，这就够我受的了，我早该去喝上一两品脱了。

english: Ah, there you are. Anything interesting happen while I was away?
zh: 啊，你在这里。我离开期间发生什么有意思的事了吗？

english: Not particularly.
Well, I suppose you're probably eager for some excitement.
zh: 好吧，我猜你大概很想来点刺激的事情。

english: Not particularly.
Is everything all right?
Not particularly.
You're a disgrace to this family.
zh: 你真是这个家族的耻辱。

english: Yes, Mother.
When your cousin Beauregard went to prison for arson, I thought that was as bad as it could ever get. Beauregard is a saint compared to you.
zh: 当你表兄博勒加德因为纵火入狱时，我还以为事情再也不可能更糟了。和你相比，博勒加德简直是圣人。

english: Yes, Mother.
I hope you're proud.
Yes, Mother.
And another thing...
I quit.
What do you mean, you quit? You can't quit.
zh: 你说什么不干了？你不能辞职。

english: Watch me.
Dmitrij?
Dmitrij!
The world hasn't heard the last of H.A.R.M.! You can either stand with us or against us.
zh: 世人还没有见识到H.A.R.M.的最后一面！你要么站在我们这边，要么与我们为敌。

english: This way! Come on!
Follow me!
Over here!
Hurry!
In here!
Fat chance of that.
What was that?
Forget about me. We're trying to stop a war, remember?
zh: 别管我。我们正在努力阻止战争，还记得吗？

english: Get out of here! I don't know how long I can hold on.
zh: 快离开这里！我不知道自己还能撑多久。

english: (Deep breath)
We're picking up an inbound jet fighter. The pilot is giving the code Foxhunt.
zh: 我们探测到一架正在接近的喷气式战斗机，飞行员报出的代码是“猎狐”。

english: Consider it done.
If I'm not back in an hour, clear out and contact headquarters.
zh: 如果我一小时内没回来，就立即撤离并联系总部。

english: Call it a hunch. Something about this assignment feels wrong.
zh: 就当是直觉吧，这个任务总让我觉得不对劲。

english: Wish me luck.
Maybe you need your arse kicked.
zh: 也许你需要有人狠狠踹你屁股。

english: We've got to get you out of here.
You don't want to know.
Let them come. We're not leaving without Armstrong.
zh: 让他们来吧。找不到阿姆斯特朗，我们就不走。

english: We'll send help!
Magnus.
And send an intercept team to the Antarctic facility. Armstrong is still there.
zh: 再派一支拦截小队前往南极设施，阿姆斯特朗还在那里。

english: That's just great.
Insufferable woman.
So sorry I can't stay to see the fireworks. I really must be going. Ta ta.
zh: 很抱歉不能留下来看烟花，我真的得走了。再见啦。

english: Abigail!!!
AAARRRRRGGGGHHHH!!! ABIGAIL!!!
zh: 啊啊啊啊啊啊啊！！！阿比盖尔！！！

english: No, please!
I'll wait for you here.
It's not like you to be cynical.
zh: 你可不像是会说这种丧气话的人。

english: No, please!
Look!
We must go. Bad guys are coming. Many helicopters.
zh: 我们必须走，坏人来了，有很多直升机。

english: We should hurry.
No, please!
No, please!
Hatori-san is waiting for you somewhere in the village.
zh: 羽鸟先生正在村里的某个地方等你。

english: Look for messages from him.
Find Hatori-san. He can help you with your mission.
zh: 找到羽鸟先生，他能帮助你完成任务。

english: Good luck!
Psst.
Caw, caw!
Over here!
It's me, Santa!
Say hello to the Mark VII Mechanized Mynah Bird. Perfect way for me to communicate with you in the field.
zh: 向马克七型机械八哥问好。这可是我在行动中与你联络的绝佳方式。

english: Now, then, anything I can do for you?
zh: 那么，有什么需要我帮忙的吗？

english: If you're unsure what to do next, consult the Mission Status screen.
zh: 不确定下一步该做什么时，请查看“任务状态”界面。

english: Unless an objective is marked optional, you must accomplish it in order to complete your mission.
zh: 除非某项目标被标记为可选，否则你必须完成它才能完成任务。

english: On certain missions you may also receive parameters, which are general guidelines or rules of conduct. Violate them at your own risk.
zh: 在某些任务中，你还会收到行动要求，也就是一些一般性的指导或行为准则。违反它们，后果自负。

english: That covers the basics.
Anything else?

The Equipment screen shows you a complete list of the weapons and gadgets you're carrying. Choosing an item from this list will bring up a detailed description and a summary of available ammunition types or gadget functions, which can also be selected here.
zh: “装备”界面会显示你当前携带的所有武器和工具。从列表中选择一件物品后，会显示详细说明，以及可用弹药类型或工具功能的摘要，你也可以在这里进行选择。

english: Jolly good. I'll be in touch soon.
zh: 太好了，我很快会再联系你。

english: Careful!
You can lean around corners to see what's up ahead.
zh: 你可以从拐角处探身，看看前方的情况。

english: Enemies will eventually notice you, though, so don't peek too long.
zh: 不过敌人最终还是会发现你，所以别探头太久。

english: Enemies can hear any sound you make, so learn to move quietly.
zh: 敌人能听见你发出的任何声音，因此要学会悄无声息地移动。

english: Your footsteps can give you away, but you can Sneak to tread softly.
zh: 脚步声会暴露你的位置，不过你可以潜行，尽量放轻脚步。

english: Keep in mind that certain materials, such as ceramic tile, magnify sound, whereas surfaces like grass or snow will dampen your footfalls.
zh: 请记住，瓷砖等材质会放大声音，而草地或积雪之类的表面则会减弱脚步声。

english: Also, be careful not to knock over bottles or bump into wind chimes or you'll cause a disturbance.
zh: 另外，小心别撞倒瓶子或碰响风铃，否则会引起骚动。

english: Try to dispatch enemies when they're unsuspecting. If they see you, they'll cry out, attracting attention.
zh: 尽量趁敌人毫无防备时解决他们。要是被看见，他们会大喊，引来其他人的注意。

english: Also, don't leave bodies lying around. Move them somewhere out of the way.
zh: 另外，别把尸体随便扔在外面，把它们搬到不显眼的地方。

english: When you overcome certain obstacles or accomplish specific objectives, you'll receive skill point rewards.
zh: 克服某些障碍或完成特定目标后，你会获得技能点奖励。

english: Bring up the Player screen to spend these points to improve your abilities.
zh: 打开“玩家”界面，使用这些技能点提升能力。

english: I'm hungry.
You just ate.
I can't help it. I eat when I'm stressed.
zh: 我也没办法，我一紧张就想吃东西。

english: Why are you stressed?
I have a bad feeling about tonight.
zh: 我对今晚有种不好的预感。

english: You're worried about one little spy?
zh: 你是在担心一个小小的间谍？

english: What? No, Kenji-san asked me to meet him later. I think he wants to break up.
zh: 什么？不是，健二先生约我晚点见面，我觉得他想和我分手。

english: My grandmother said you should poison your man every morning before he leaves. Tell him he can have the antidote when he comes home.
zh: 我祖母说，男人每天早上出门前都应该给他下毒，再告诉他回家后才能拿到解药。

english: What poison should I use?
I'm sure my grandmother can give you something. She doesn't need it anymore.
zh: 我祖母肯定能给你点什么，反正她现在也用不着了。

english: She's not worried about your grandfather running away?
zh: 她不担心你祖父逃走吗？

english: He can't. He's paralyzed. You have to be very careful with the dosage.
zh: 他逃不了，已经瘫痪了。剂量一定要非常小心。

english: Do you want to go shopping in Nagoya this weekend?
zh: 这周末要不要去名古屋购物？

english: I can't. I have an assassination.
Get Haruko to do it.
She's still mad at me about her cat.
zh: 她还在为她那只猫的事生我的气。

english: What about Yuki?
I'll ask her.
Let me know.

Notice the Hiding Place icon in the bottom corner of your screen? This indicates you have entered a potential hiding place. In order to become truly hidden, you must stand still until the Hidden icon shows. Once you are hidden, enemies will not be able to see you unless they are investigating a disturbance or actively searching the area.
zh: 看到屏幕下方角落里的“藏身处”图标了吗？这表示你进入了一个可能的藏身地点。要真正隐藏起来，你必须保持不动，直到出现“已隐藏”图标。隐藏后，除非敌人正在调查骚动或主动搜索该区域，否则他们无法看见你。

english: You are only hidden when standing still. If you move, attack, or reload a weapon, you will become unhidden.
zh: 只有站着不动时才算隐藏。移动、攻击或给武器装弹都会解除隐藏状态。

english: What happened to your arm?
I got in a fight with my mom.
Looks like she cut you pretty badly.
zh: 看起来她把你砍得不轻。

english: She caught me by surprise. She's fast for her age.
zh: 她偷袭了我。她这个年纪动作还挺快。

english: She must have been really mad.
She thinks we don't dress properly for ninjas. I'm like, Mom, it's the '60s. Get used to it. And she's like, It's disrespectful. So I said, old people always say that.
zh: 她觉得我们穿得不像忍者。我就说：“妈，现在都六十年代了，接受现实吧。”她却说：“这样太不尊重传统了。”于是我说，老人家总爱这么讲。

english: Uh oh.

Yeah, she went kind of crazy. She came flying across the room and started slashing at me. Finally I fought her off, but I was worried I was going to accidentally stab her. That would have made her really mad.
zh: 是啊，她一下子就发疯了。她飞身越过房间，开始拿刀乱砍。最后我总算把她击退了，不过我一直担心会不小心捅到她。那样她肯定会更生气。

english: You better buy her some chocolates or something.
zh: 你最好给她买点巧克力什么的。

english: Good idea.
Agent Archer, over here!
I have bad news. They've moved the meeting. You'll have to find out where.
zh: 我有个坏消息。他们改变了会面地点，你得查出新地点在哪里。

english: Look for places where ninjas are gathered together.
Maybe you can hear them talking about the new location.
zh: 也许你能偷听到他们谈论新的地点。

english: You might be able to find a memo, but that's risky.
zh: 或许能找到一张备忘录，不过那样风险很大。

english: Be careful!
Why are they moving the meeting to the main house?
zh: 他们为什么把会议改到主宅了？

english: Isako-san says the Director wants it there.
zh: 伊沙子说局长希望在那里开。

english: He's probably too drunk to walk to the guest house.
zh: 他大概醉得连走到客房都做不到了。

english: No, he'd just call for his palanquin.
zh: 不会，他只会叫人抬轿子。

english: I hate working for him.
We all do, but Isako-san owes him a debt of honor.
zh: 我们都讨厌，不过伊沙子欠他一份恩情。

english: Good work! I'll mark the location of the meeting on this map.
zh: 干得好！我会在这张地图上标出会面地点。

english: Okay, follow me!
The patrols are heavier in this part of town.
zh: 城镇这一带的巡逻更加密集。

english: It's safer to avoid them.
Avoid the main gate. Too many guards.
Good luck.
Any trouble?
It's been very quiet.
Good.
The spy has been spotted.
Stay alert.
I noticed she's been gaining a lot of weight recently.
zh: 我发现她最近胖了不少。

english: All she does is sit around eating mochi and watching detective shows.
zh: 她整天只知道坐着吃年糕、看侦探剧。

english: She needs to find a man to take care of her.
zh: 她需要找个男人照顾她。

english: No one wants her. She's too shy. Maybe if she was prettier, but she can't even talk to men.
zh: 没人想要她，她太害羞了。要是长得漂亮些也许还有机会，可她连和男人说话都不敢。

english: What about Kenichi's son? He's a little slow, but he's still nice looking.
zh: 健一的儿子怎么样？他虽然有点迟钝，但长得还算不错。

english: She'd never agree. She's too picky.
zh: 她肯定不会答应，太挑剔了。

english: What's wrong with her?
What time is it?
I don't know. Why?
I'm supposed to relieve Masayo-san at 8:00. You don't have a watch?
zh: 我应该在八点接替雅代小姐。你没戴表吗？

english: I don't need one. Ninjas can tell time by the slit of a cat's eye.
zh: 我不需要，忍者可以根据猫眼瞳孔的宽窄判断时间。

english: That only works during daylight. Besides, what happens if you don't have a cat handy?
zh: 那只有白天才管用。而且手边没有猫时怎么办？

english: That's why I always carry dried fish.
zh: 所以我总是随身带着鱼干。

english: Isn't easier just to wear a watch? Never mind. I'll go ask somebody else.
zh: 戴块表不是更方便吗？算了，我去问别人。

english: It's such a nice evening. Too bad we have to work.
zh: 今晚天气真不错，可惜我们还得工作。

english: It'll probably be raining this weekend.
Want some tea?
I'm supposed to go on patrol soon. If I drink tea, I'll have to pee fifteen minutes later.
zh: 我马上要去巡逻。喝了茶，十五分钟后我就得去小便。

english: So?
I got in trouble last week. It's not worth it.
zh: 我上周因此挨了训，不值得。

english: Find her!
Quickly!
Don't let her escape!
Search everywhere!
If she gets away, we're in big trouble!
zh: 要是让她跑了，我们就有大麻烦了！

english: She may come this way. Make sure she doesn't get by you!
zh: 她可能会往这边来，确保别让她从你这里溜过去！

english: Hai!
Cate, I've dispatched an intercept team to assist you, but it may take some time for them to reach the rendezvous point. Get back to the bridge and try to avoid being seen.
zh: 凯特，我已经派出一支拦截小队协助你，不过他们可能需要一段时间才能抵达会合点。回到桥上，尽量别被发现。

english: Have they found her?
Not yet. Be careful!
Do you have a paper clip?
We're all out.
Have you requisitioned more?
Of course not.
What do you mean? Why not?
Do you know how many forms you have to fill out to request office materials? It's worse than lavatory supplies. We don't need paper clips.
zh: 你知道申请办公用品要填多少张表吗？比申请厕所用品还麻烦。我们不需要回形针。

english: And when you run out of staples?
zh: 那订书钉用完了怎么办？

english: I can live without staples.
zh: 没有订书钉我也活得下去。

english: You disgust me.
It's colder than yesterday.
Just think, if we conquer America, Florida will be part of the Soviet Union.
zh: 想想看，要是我们征服了美国，佛罗里达就会成为苏联的一部分。

english: Last year for holiday they sent me to Murmansk.
zh: 去年休假时，他们把我派去了摩尔曼斯克。

english: At least I got Minsk.
zh: 至少我被派去了明斯克。

english: I dream of being sent to Minsk. I don't remember what it's like to go to bed without wearing a jacket.
zh: 我做梦都想被派去明斯克。我都快忘了不穿外套睡觉是什么感觉了。

english: Did you send in that security report yet?
zh: 那份安全报告你交了吗？

english: Yesterday, why?
I forgot to fill it out.
What do you mean?
I didn't fill it out.
Then why did you ask me to send it?
zh: 那你为什么还让我交上去？

english: I'm not sure. I didn't even think about it.
zh: 我也不知道，根本没想过。

english: Well, I doubt anyone will notice. They don't read those things anyway. If they complain, we'll just resubmit.
zh: 算了，我怀疑根本没人会注意。他们反正也不看那些东西。要是有人抱怨，我们再重新提交就是了。

english: You misunderstand me, Comrade. My point is that the State IS the People. When you abuse the People, you abuse the State.
zh: 你误解我的意思了，同志。我的观点是，国家就是人民。你虐待人民，就是虐待国家。

english: But the State abuses the People all the time. What do you call that, masochism?
zh: 可国家一直都在虐待人民。那算什么，受虐癖吗？

english: The State doesn't ABUSE the People, it GUIDES them.
zh: 国家不是在虐待人民，而是在引导他们。

english: My grandfather died at the hands of the Cheka. He was put in a barrel with rats. The 18 year old torturer who came up with the idea heated the barrel until the rats clawed their way inside my grandfather's body to escape the heat. Do you call that guidance?
zh: 我祖父死在契卡手里。他们把他和老鼠一起塞进桶里。想出这个点子的十八岁拷问员不断加热木桶，逼得老鼠为了躲避高温，撕开我祖父的身体钻进体内。你把这也叫引导吗？

english: Disciplinary measures are sometimes necessary to preserve the sanctity of the State. If an ugly tumor grows on your nose, you cut it off to protect your body.
zh: 为了维护国家的神圣，有时确实需要采取惩戒措施。要是鼻子上长了个难看的肿瘤，就得把它切掉，以保护整个身体。

english: My grandfather was a peasant. He died because he was afraid of collectivization.
zh: 我祖父只是个农民，他之所以死，是因为害怕集体化。

english: The People must learn to trust the State.
zh: 人民必须学会信任国家。

english: I thought you said the People ARE the State.
zh: 你不是说人民就是国家吗？

english: Yes, which means they must learn to trust themselves.
zh: 没错，也就是说，他们必须学会信任自己。

english: My grandfather DID trust himself. That's why the State tortured and killed him.
zh: 我祖父的确信任自己，所以国家才拷打并杀害了他。

english: I can see that your patriotism is in question, Comrade. Perhaps you should consider a visit to the Attitude Adjustment Center in Prague.
zh: 看来你的爱国思想很成问题，同志。也许你应该考虑去布拉格的思想矫正中心走一趟。

english: Those two are at it again.
Sergei never gives up, does he?
zh: 谢尔盖从来都不肯罢休，是吧？

english: He's young and idealistic. Give him time.
zh: 他还年轻，又太理想主义了。给他点时间吧。

english: This is Kominsky. We found a suspicious person at the old dacha by the lake. We're bringing him in for interrogation.
zh: 这里是科明斯基。我们在湖边的旧别墅发现了一个可疑人物，现在正把他带回来审讯。

english: What were you doing there?
Vacation.
You must take me for a fool. No one would come to this place for vacation.
zh: 你一定把我当成傻子了，没人会来这种地方度假。

english: I come for hunting.
Admit it, you're a spy.
Why would I come here to spy?
Because you know that a top secret project is being worked on at this base.
zh: 因为你知道这个基地正在进行一项绝密计划。

english: It is?
Igor.
What?
You just told him about the project.
zh: 你刚刚把计划告诉他了。

english: He tricked me!
How did I trick you?
You got me to tell you about Project: Omega.
zh: 你让我说出了欧米伽计划。

english: Project: Omega?
Igor, you fool!
Damn it. This prisoner is too devious. We'd better torture him.
zh: 该死，这个囚犯太狡猾了，我们最好拷问他。

english: Thank you for helping me.
I'm going to sample their vodka before I go back.
zh: 回去前，我要尝尝他们的伏特加。

english: I'll see you later.
Don't you have work to do?
zh: 你不是还有工作要做吗？

english: Complete mission so we can get out of here.
zh: 赶紧完成任务，我们就能离开这里了。

english: I hate Siberia.
People have been exiled to Siberia since time of Genghis Khan.
zh: 从成吉思汗时代开始，人们就被流放到西伯利亚。

english: Siberians make good butter, though.
zh: 不过西伯利亚人做的黄油很好吃。

english: Also, Lake Baikal is very beautiful in summertime.
zh: 而且贝加尔湖夏天非常美丽。

english: Did you know it's largest body of fresh water in whole world?
zh: 你知道它是全世界最大的淡水湖吗？

english: Eh, it's not bad place to live.
zh: 呃，这地方住起来也不算太糟。

english: Your pilot has been captured.
They're interrogating him in the supply building.
zh: 他们正在补给大楼里审讯他。

english: You'd better liberate him if you want to come home.
zh: 想回家的话，你最好把他救出来。

english: Have you heard from Tania?
zh: 你收到塔尼娅的消息了吗？

english: I got a letter from her last week. She's staying with her mother in Omsk.
zh: 上周收到了她的信。她现在和母亲住在鄂木斯克。

english: Has she decided?
Not yet.
What's taking her so long?
Her friends don't like me. They want her to go back to her ex-boyfriend.
zh: 她的朋友不喜欢我，想让她和前男友复合。

english: I thought he used to beat her.
zh: 我还以为她前男友以前经常打她。

english: He did. But he's a political officer. I'm a low ranked soldier in Siberia.
zh: 是的，不过他是政治军官，而我只是个驻扎在西伯利亚的低级士兵。

english: Women.
I heard you used to be stationed in Moscow.
zh: 听说你以前驻扎在莫斯科。

english: Da.
So how did you end up in this place?
zh: 那你怎么会被弄到这种地方？

english: I asked my commanding officer about getting new socks after I got frostbite on my foot. He said... You think you're cold now? Wait till you get to Siberia.
zh: 我的脚冻伤后，我问指挥官能不能领双新袜子。他说：“你觉得现在冷？等你到了西伯利亚再说吧。”

english: I ended up here by accident. I got on a train for Petrograd and it dropped me off in Minsk. I tried to explain I wasn't stationed here, but no one believed me.
zh: 我是意外来到这里的。我上了一列去彼得格勒的火车，结果它把我扔在了明斯克。我试着解释自己并不驻扎在这里，可没人相信。

english: Couldn't they just look it up?
zh: 他们不能查一下记录吗？

english: Just because they keep all those records doesn't mean they can make any sense out of them. I found out I was never even reported missing from my post in Petrograd.
zh: 他们保存了那么多记录，不代表自己能看懂。我后来才发现，彼得格勒那边甚至从来没把我登记为失踪。

english: <INTELLIGENCE ITEMS C01S01>
UNUSED

Public Notice: Village curfew@PUBLIC NOTICE:

A mandatory curfew is in effect tonight from 6:00pm to 6:00am. Residents caught out of doors during these hours will be dealt with severely. 

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator
Katakuri Ninja Clan
zh:
公告：村庄宵禁@公共告示：

今晚将实行强制宵禁，时间为下午6:00至次日上午6:00。凡在此期间被发现身处户外的居民，都将受到严厉处置。

室井春子
助理管理员
片栗忍者一族

english:
Ninja Clan Memo: Patrols@To all clan members:

We expect the spy to enter the village from the east, where most of the best tourist attractions are concentrated, but it's also possible she'll approach from the direction of the falls. Please report to your assigned posts promptly this evening. It is recommended you eat before your shift begins, as our food budget was used up by last month's attack on the Oshii clan headquarters.

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator
zh:
忍者一族备忘录：巡逻@致全体族人：

我们预计那个间谍会从村庄东侧进入，因为那里集中了大部分最受欢迎的旅游景点，不过她也可能从瀑布方向接近。今晚请准时前往各自负责的岗位。建议大家在轮班开始前先吃饭，因为我们的伙食预算已经被上个月对押井一族总部的袭击耗尽了。

室井春子
助理管理员

english:
UNITY Dossier: Ninjas@Cate,

While information on the ninja clan in Inotakimura is somewhat scarce, we have been able to ascertain the following details:

- Ninjas are trained to lunge great distances for powerful strikes against their enemies.

- They can use smoke bombs to vanish, often reappearing close to their targets for surprise attacks.

I hope this information proves helpful. Take care of yourself.

Bruno Lawrie
Senior Field Operative
UNITY Special Operations Division
zh:
UNITY档案：忍者@凯特：

尽管有关稻泷村忍者一族的情报相当有限，但我们仍然确认了以下几点：

- 忍者能够向前突进很长一段距离，对敌人发动强力攻击。

- 他们可以利用烟雾弹消失，并经常在目标附近重新现身，发动突袭。

希望这些信息能对你有所帮助。保重。

布鲁诺·劳里
高级外勤特工
UNITY特别行动部门

english:
UNITY Memo: Bonus objectives@Agent Archer,

Sometimes you will come across opportunities for bonus assignments which you can complete for additional Skill Points. Keep your eyes open for intelligence items such as notes, briefcases, or letters.

Here's a simple optional objective for practice: I've scattered six pages from the UNITY field manual throughout the general area. Collect them all before moving on.

Santa,
Director of Gadgetry
UNITY Toymaker Division
zh:
UNITY备忘录：奖励目标@阿彻特工：

有时你会遇到可供完成的奖励任务，完成后可获得额外技能点。请注意搜集笔记、公文包或信件等情报物品。

这里有个简单的可选目标，供你练习：我把UNITY外勤手册中的六页内容散落在这片区域各处。继续前进之前，请将它们全部收集起来。

圣诞老人
工具研发局局长
UNITY玩具制造部门

english:
UNITY Manual: Searching@SEARCHING

Enemies often carry valuable items such as ammunition, armor, first aid, or important documents, so be sure to search them thoroughly by holding down the Action button until the progress bar disappears. You may want to move your victims into the shadows before searching them to avoid drawing unwanted attention.

You can also search filing cabinets and stacks of paper for hints and useful intelligence items. It is often by searching that you will find bonus objectives.
zh:
UNITY手册：搜查@搜查

敌人经常携带弹药、护甲、急救用品或重要文件等有价值的物品，因此务必彻底搜查他们。持续按住“操作”键，直到进度条消失，即可拿走其携带的全部物品。为了避免引来不必要的注意，搜查前可以先把倒下的敌人搬到阴暗处。

你也可以搜查文件柜和成堆的纸张，从中寻找提示与有用的情报物品。许多奖励目标都需要通过搜查才能发现。

english:
UNITY Manual: Unconscious enemies@UNCONSCIOUS ENEMIES

Enemies that are knocked unconscious, such as by a taser or sleeping gas, will eventually wake up. They may also be roused by their comrades.

You can disarm unconscious enemies by searching them, thereby eliminating them as a threat unless they obtain a replacement weapon.
zh:
UNITY手册：昏迷的敌人@昏迷的敌人

被电击枪或催眠气体等手段击昏的敌人最终会醒来，也可能被同伴唤醒。

搜查昏迷的敌人可以解除其武装。除非他们重新获得武器，否则将不再构成威胁。

english:
UNITY Manual: Action button@ACTION BUTTON

When you target an object or character you can interact with, text will appear at the center of the screen to indicate what will happen when you press the Action button (default: Right Mouse Button). If the text is grayed out, you cannot interact with the item until some condition is met. For example, you may have to unlock a door or acquire a necessary inventory item.

The Action button will reload your currently selected weapon (assuming it can be reloaded) if nothing is targeted.
zh:
UNITY手册：操作键@操作键

当你瞄准可以互动的物体或角色时，屏幕中央会显示文字，说明按下“操作”键（默认：鼠标右键）后将发生什么。如果文字呈灰色，则表示必须先满足某项条件才能互动。例如，你可能需要先打开门锁，或取得必要的物品栏道具。

若当前没有瞄准任何目标，按下“操作”键会为当前选中的武器装弹，前提是该武器可以装弹。

english:
UNITY Manual: Hiding@HIDING

Whenever you enter a potential hiding place, the Hiding Place icon will appear at the bottom of your screen. If you stand perfectly still, you will momentarily become hidden, at which point enemies won't see you until they're right upon you. You will stay hidden as long as you remain in the hiding place and don't move quickly or fire a weapon.

If you can't hide because an enemy knows where you are, the icon will be crossed out.
zh:
UNITY手册：隐藏@隐藏

每当你进入一个可能的藏身处时，屏幕底部都会出现“藏身处”图标。只要完全静止不动，片刻后便会进入隐藏状态。此时，除非敌人几乎走到你面前，否则无法看见你。只要继续留在藏身处，不快速移动，也不开枪，就能保持隐藏状态。

如果敌人已经知道你的位置，导致你无法隐藏，图标上会出现叉号。

english:
UNITY Manual: Intelligence items@INTELLIGENCE ITEMS

Be sure to search everywhere for important documents. Some may contain information vital to your current mission. Others may give you Skill Point rewards.

Documents you pick up can be viewed at any time during a mission by accessing the Intelligence screen (default hotkey: I).
zh:
UNITY手册：情报物品@情报物品

务必仔细搜索各处的重要文件。其中一些可能包含当前任务所必需的情报，另一些则会提供技能点奖励。

任务期间，你可以随时进入“情报”界面（默认快捷键：I），查看已经取得的文件。

english: UNITY Manual: Leaving an area 1@LEAVING AN AREA, PART 1\n\nWhen you see the Door icon, it means you are approaching the end of an area. Move forward to exit, but only if you're finished exploring.
zh: UNITY手册：离开区域1@离开区域，第1部分\n\n看到“门”图标时，表示你正在接近该区域的出口。确认已经探索完毕后，继续向前即可离开。

english:
UNITY Memo: Presents@Agent Archer,

Whenever possible, I will arrange to leave useful equipment or ammunition for you in the field. Keep an eye out for foiled-wrapped presents like this one.

The coins you'll find in this package are worth more than their face value suggests, as you can throw them to distract enemies. You can even lure enemies away from their posts by tossing a coin around a corner or into an alley.

Santa
zh:
UNITY备忘录：礼物@阿彻特工：

条件允许时，我会设法在行动区域中为你留下有用的装备或弹药。请留意像这个一样用锡纸包装的礼物。

这个包裹里的硬币远比面值更有用，因为你可以把它们扔出去吸引敌人的注意。把硬币投向拐角另一侧或小巷里，甚至可以把敌人从岗位上引开。

圣诞老人

english: Reminder: Mission status@MISSION SCREEN\n\nConsult the Mission screen (default hotkey: Tab) for information on your current assignment. Here you will find your current objectives, which you must complete in order to accomplish your mission. Optional objectives (secondary tasks you can perform for bonus Skill Points) are also listed here, along with Parameters, which are general guidelines or rules of conduct. Violating parameters may result in forfeited Skill Point rewards or even mission failure.
zh: 提醒：任务状态@任务界面\n\n请查看“任务”界面（默认快捷键：Tab），了解当前任务的相关信息。这里会列出完成任务所必需的当前目标，也会显示可选目标，即完成后可获得额外技能点的次要任务，以及行动要求，也就是一般性的指导或行为准则。违反行动要求，可能导致无法获得技能点奖励，甚至造成任务失败。

english: Reminder: Equipment screen@EQUIPMENT SCREEN\n\nWhenever you acquire new weapons, gadgets, or ammunition, remember that you can consult the Equipment screen (default hotkey: M) at any time for information on their features and uses. This screen also lets you select equipment and ammunition or gadget functions while the game is paused.
